issues.title: No schema scripts found at location 'classpath:org/springframework/ai/chat/memory/repository/jdbc/schema-mysql.sql'
issues.body:
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a51e1a7e-964e-4ef7-bda3-e501481d2b7a)

**Bug description**
Caused by: java.lang.IllegalStateException: No schema scripts found at location 'classpath:org/springframework/ai/chat/memory/repository/jdbc/schema-mysql.sql'
	at org.springframework.boot.sql.init.AbstractScriptDatabaseInitializer.getScripts(AbstractScriptDatabaseInitializer.java:129) ~[spring-boot-3.5.0.jar:3.5.0]
	at org.springframework.boot.sql.init.AbstractScriptDatabaseInitializer.applyScripts(AbstractScriptDatabaseInitializer.java:106) ~[spring-boot-3.5.0.jar:3.5.0]
	at org.springframework.boot.sql.init.AbstractScriptDatabaseInitializer.applySchemaScripts(AbstractScriptDatabaseInitializer.java:98) ~[spring-boot-3.5.0.jar:3.5.0]
	at org.springframework.boot.sql.init.AbstractScriptDatabaseInitializer.initializeDatabase(AbstractScriptDatabaseInitializer.java:76) ~[spring-boot-3.5.0.jar:3.5.0]
	at org.springframework.boot.sql.init.AbstractScriptDatabaseInitializer.afterPropertiesSet(AbstractScriptDatabaseInitializer.java:66) ~[spring-boot-3.5.0.jar:3.5.0]
	at org.springframework.beans.factory.support.AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory.invokeInitMethods(AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory.java:1873) ~[spring-beans-6.2.7.jar:6.2.7]
	at org.springframework.beans.factory.support.AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory.initializeBean(AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory.java:1822) ~[spring-beans-6.2.7.jar:6.2.7]
	... 36 common frames omitted


**Environment**
Spring AI 1.0.0
spring-ai-starter-model-chat-memory-repository-jdbc 1.0.0

**Steps to reproduce**

    @Bean
    public ChatMemoryRepository getChatMemoryRepository(JdbcTemplate jdbcTemplate) {
        return JdbcChatMemoryRepository.builder()
                .jdbcTemplate(jdbcTemplate)
                .dialect(new MysqlChatMemoryRepositoryDialect())
                .build();
    }

comments.body: I've opened a PR for the out-of-the-box support for MySQL: #3320
